items.titolo: Falsa app ChatGPT installa malware per Windows e macOS
items.descrizione: I cybercriminali hanno usato ChatGPT per creare una pagina di errore con link ai presunti installer delle app per Windows e macOS del chatbot. The post Falsa app ChatGPT installa malware per Windows e macOS appeared firs

items.titolo: Nvidia and Microsoft tease "a new era of PC" ahead of Computex 2026 — coordinated social media posts could indicate that rumored N1X laptops will be Windows on Arm systems
items.descrizione: An Nvidia-powered Arm PC running Windows could inspire new local AI experiences beyond Copilot+.

items.titolo: I'm an iPhone user who switches to Gemini with Android Auto in the car - why I don't regret it
items.descrizione: Gemini can help with a variety of tasks when behind the wheel. All you need is an Android phone and a car with Android Auto.
Pope Leo XIV may not be able to disarm AI, but he’s got the attention of the industry.
